metadata.name: Update Attorney Bio on Firm Website

description: An attorney has been promoted to partner. The marketing department needs to update their bio on the firm's website.

nodes.task_description: Locate the attorney's profile page in the website's content management system (CMS).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the correct page to edit.

nodes.task_description: Update the attorney's title from 'Associate' to 'Partner'.
Add any new representative matters or awards to their bio.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent updates the content of the bio.

nodes.task_description: Publish the changes to make the updated bio live.

expected_outcome.expected: The website now reflects the attorney's promotion.
